source_jobs.title: French-Speaking Customer Experience Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE FLEX


At The Flex, we’re on a mission to revolutionize how the world rents.
We believe finding and staying in a home should be as seamless as buying on Amazon — simple, fast, and borderless.

Powered by our proprietary Property Management System (PMS), The Flex enables effortless guest experiences and streamlined operations for property owners across the globe.

We’re building a team of A-Players — ambitious, proactive professionals who thrive in fast-paced environments, embrace ownership, and deliver excellence in everything they do.



POSITION SUMMARY

As a French-Speaking Customer Experience Specialist, you’ll be the voice and heartbeat of The Flex for our guests and landlords.

From the first inquiry to the final check-out, you’ll ensure every interaction is smooth, efficient, and memorable. You’ll handle communication, solve problems, and use our in-house technology to deliver world-class service that reflects our commitment to operational excellence and customer delight.

This role is perfect for someone empathetic, detail-oriented, and passionate about helping others — someone who takes pride in turning challenges into exceptional experiences.



💡 KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Customer Support – Respond promptly and professionally to guest and landlord inquiries via email, chat, and phone — in both French and English.

Booking Assistance – Guide guests through the reservation, check-in, and check-out processes using our PMS tools.

Problem Solving – Investigate and resolve issues quickly while maintaining a calm, empathetic, solution-focused approach.

Knowledge Management – Accurately document interactions, feedback, and resolutions to help improve service quality.

Cross-Team Collaboration – Work closely with Operations and Tech to identify recurring issues, propose improvements, and optimize the user experience.

Upselling & Retention – Identify opportunities to enhance stays or strengthen long-term relationships with landlords and guests.



🧠 WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Fluency in French and English (written and spoken)

 - Proven experience in customer service, ideally in hospitality, real estate, or tech-enabled platforms

 - Excellent communication and interpersonal skills — you listen, understand, and make people feel heard

 - Strong organizational abilities and composure under pressure

 - Tech-savvy — comfortable using PMS, CRM, and digital support tools

 - A problem-solving mindset with empathy, patience, and meticulous attention to detail
   


🌍 WHY JOIN THE FLEX

Be part of the revolution – Help reshape the $4T global rental industry.

Work with the best – Join a high-performing, supportive international team.

Grow fast – Real career progression opportunities as we expand globally.

Earn what you deserve – Competitive compensation plus performance-based incentives.

Live flexibly – Remote-first, results-driven culture — work from anywhere.

If you’re ready to join a company redefining how people live, move, and rent, we’d love to hear from you.


#LI-Remote

source_jobs.title: Entrepreneur in Residence (EIR)
source_jobs.description:
Base360.ai http://Base360.ai is building the AI operating system for B2C businesses.

We unify every customer interaction—from social media comments and DMs to WhatsApp, email, SMS and phone calls—into a single platform powered by AI. Our mission is to replace dozens of disconnected tools with one intelligent operating system that helps businesses acquire, engage and convert customers.

We're building ambitious products, moving fast, and looking for exceptional entrepreneurs who want to build the next generation of AI companies from within.




THE ROLE

As an Entrepreneur in Residence (EIR), you won't be joining a department—you'll be building one.

Your mission is to identify a major opportunity, build a new product or business vertical within Base360.ai http://Base360.ai, assemble the right team, validate the market, and grow it into a standalone business with significant revenue and impact.

Think of it as founding a startup—with the advantage of funding, engineering, design, AI infrastructure, customers, distribution, and executive support already behind you.

If successful, you will become the long-term leader of your venture.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Identify high-potential opportunities that can become new products or business verticals.

 - Validate customer problems through research and direct conversations.

 - Define the product vision, strategy, and go-to-market plan.

 - Work alongside engineering, product, design and AI teams to build and launch quickly.

 - Recruit and lead your own multidisciplinary team as the venture grows.

 - Own growth, product adoption, customer success and financial performance.

 - Make data-driven decisions and iterate rapidly based on customer feedback.

 - Present progress directly to the founders and executive team.

 - Build a business that could eventually operate as its own division—or even become an independent company.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Entrepreneurial mindset with a bias toward action.

 - Exceptional problem-solving ability.

 - Strong product and commercial intuition.

 - Comfortable working with ambiguity and creating structure where none exists.

 - Excellent communication and leadership skills.

 - Ability to recruit, inspire and lead high-performing teams.

 - Highly analytical with strong execution capabilities.

 - Obsession with customers and building products people love.

 - Comfortable wearing multiple hats across product, sales, marketing and operations.

 - AI-native and excited about building with the latest AI technologies.

Previous startup experience—as a founder, early employee, product leader, operator or investor—is highly valued but not required.




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Within your first 12–24 months, you will have:

 - Built and launched a new business vertical.

 - Hired and led your own cross-functional team.

 - Achieved strong product-market fit.

 - Generated meaningful recurring revenue.

 - Established yourself as the long-term General Manager of your venture.




WHY JOIN BASE360.AI http://Base360.ai?

 - Be part of an innovative and fast-growing company building the AI operating system for B2C brands.

 - Build your own venture with the backing of an experienced founding team.

 - Access world-class engineering, AI, product, design and go-to-market resources.

 - Receive funding, mentorship and strategic support to turn your vision into reality.

 - Opportunity to build a team and establish a long-term business within Base360.ai http://Base360.ai.

 - Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

 - Significant long-term career growth, with the opportunity to lead an entire business unit.




YOU SHOULD NOT APPLY IF:

 - You are looking for a corporate 9 to 5 job.

 - You are political and enjoy gossiping and talking about people behind their backs.

 - You are looking for a stable and slow dead-end job.

 - You do not aim to be one of the best in the world at what you do.

#LI-Remote

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Product Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At The Flex, we believe renting a home should be as simple as booking a ride.

Our mission is to enable anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai http://Base360.ai, our proprietary technology platform, we are building the operating system for modern renting—automating operations, connecting systems, and creating seamless experiences for guests, landlords, and operators worldwide.

We're looking for a Full-Stack Product Engineer who thrives at the intersection of product, engineering, and execution.

This isn't a role where you'll simply implement tickets.

You'll identify problems, design solutions, build products, automate workflows, and help shape the future of the platform.




WHAT YOU'LL DO


BUILD PRODUCTS END-TO-END

Take ideas from concept to production by designing, building, testing, and launching features that create measurable business impact.


OWN CUSTOMER PROBLEMS

Work directly with founders and operational teams to understand challenges and transform them into elegant software solutions.


MOVE FAST

Ship quickly, gather feedback, iterate, and continuously improve products based on real-world usage.


CREATE AUTOMATION

Design systems that eliminate manual work and allow the company to scale efficiently.


BUILD INTERNAL TOOLS

Develop operational dashboards, workflow engines, management platforms, and AI-powered tools used across the business.


CONNECT EXTERNAL SYSTEMS

Build integrations with platforms such as Airbnb, Stripe, Hostaway, Twilio, Google, and OpenAI.


LEVERAGE AI

Implement AI-powered features and workflows that improve productivity, decision-making, and customer experience.


SCALE THE PLATFORM

Ensure systems remain reliable, secure, and scalable as the business grows internationally.




TECH STACK

Current technologies include:

 - Python

 - FastAPI

 - React

 - TypeScript

 - Supabase

 - PostgreSQL

 - AWS

 - OpenAI APIs

 - Stripe

 - Twilio

 - GitHub Actions

You don't need experience with every technology listed above, but you should be capable of learning quickly and adapting.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


MUST-HAVE

 - Strong full-stack development experience

 - Experience building production-grade web applications

 - Strong understanding of APIs and databases

 - Product mindset and user-centric thinking

 - Ability to work independently and take ownership

 - Strong problem-solving skills

 - Excellent written communication


NICE-TO-HAVE

 - Experience with FastAPI

 - Experience with React and TypeScript

 - Experience with AI tools or LLM integrations

 - Startup experience

 - PropTech, marketplace, or SaaS experience
   


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Within your first year:

 - You've launched multiple high-impact features

 - Manual operational processes have been automated

 - Product development cycles are significantly faster

 - AI-powered workflows have been deployed across the business

 - Base360.ai http://Base360.ai has become a stronger competitive advantage for The Flex
   


WHY JOIN THE FLEX


MASSIVE OWNERSHIP

You'll have direct influence over product decisions, architecture, and company strategy.


BUILD REAL PRODUCTS

Your work will impact thousands of users and properties across multiple countries.


LEARN AT STARTUP SPEED

You'll work closely with founders and gain exposure to engineering, product, operations, AI, and business.


REMOTE-FIRST

Work from anywhere.


HIGH GROWTH ENVIRONMENT

We're building quickly and looking for people who want to grow alongside the company.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

 - You prefer highly structured corporate environments

 - You only want to write code from predefined specifications

 - You avoid ownership outside your immediate responsibilities

 - You are uncomfortable moving quickly and adapting to change
   

If you love building products, solving real-world problems, and creating systems that scale, we'd love to hear from you.



#LI-Remote

source_jobs.title: Founding Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At The Flex, we believe renting a home should be as effortless as booking a ride.

Our mission is ambitious: enable anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai http://Base360.ai, our proprietary technology platform, we are building the operating system for modern renting—automating operations, connecting fragmented systems, and creating seamless experiences for guests, landlords, and operators across the world.

We're looking for a Founding Software Engineer to help architect and build the technology that powers the future of The Flex.

This is not a typical engineering role.

You'll work directly with the founder, influence product strategy, make architectural decisions, and build systems that become the foundation of a global business.

You'll have extraordinary ownership, responsibility, and impact from day one.




WHAT YOU'LL BUILD

As a Founding Software Engineer, you'll help create and scale Base360.ai http://Base360.ai—the technology platform that powers every aspect of The Flex.

From AI-powered workflows and booking systems to operational automation and intelligent decision-making, you'll build products that directly impact revenue, efficiency, and customer experience.

You won't just ship features.

You'll create systems that replace manual work, unlock scale, and become a competitive advantage for the company.




YOUR MISSION


BUILD CORE PRODUCTS

Design, build, and launch the software that powers bookings, pricing, payments, operations, communications, and guest experiences.


ARCHITECT THE PLATFORM

Make key technical decisions and help define the long-term architecture of Base360.ai http://Base360.ai.


CREATE AUTOMATION AT SCALE

Develop workflows and systems that automate operational processes across multiple countries and thousands of stays.


LEVERAGE AI

Build AI-powered tools, agents, and workflows that improve productivity, decision-making, and customer experience.


INTEGRATE THE ECOSYSTEM

Develop and maintain integrations with platforms including Airbnb, Hostaway, Stripe, Twilio, Google, OpenAI, and other strategic partners.


MOVE FAST

Operate with urgency and ownership, turning ideas into production-ready solutions quickly and effectively.


SOLVE REAL PROBLEMS

Work on challenges such as:

 - Reservation synchronization

 - Dynamic pricing

 - Smart access management

 - Guest communication automation

 - Operational forecasting

 - Maintenance and cleaning automation

 - AI-powered alerts and monitoring

 - Revenue optimization


HELP BUILD THE COMPANY

As one of the first engineers, your influence will extend beyond code. You'll help shape processes, culture, product direction, and the future engineering team.




TECH STACK

Our current stack includes:

 - Python

 - FastAPI

 - React

 - TypeScript

 - Supabase

 - PostgreSQL

 - AWS

 - OpenAI APIs

 - Stripe

 - Twilio

 - Docker

 - GitHub Actions

We care more about your ability to learn and build than your experience with any specific technology.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


MUST HAVE

 - Strong software engineering fundamentals

 - Experience building production-grade applications

 - Strong understanding of APIs, databases, and system design

 - Product mindset and customer obsession

 - Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 - Strong problem-solving ability

 - High level of ownership and accountability


BONUS POINTS

 - Startup experience

 - Experience with AI products or LLM integrations

 - Experience building SaaS products

 - Experience with FastAPI, React, AWS, or Supabase

 - Marketplace, travel, or PropTech experience
   


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Within your first year:

 - Critical company operations are automated through systems you've built

 - Base360.ai http://Base360.ai becomes a core competitive advantage

 - New products are shipped rapidly and reliably

 - Engineering velocity increases significantly

 - AI-powered workflows are embedded across the business

 - The

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineering Lead
source_jobs.description:
At The Flex, we believe renting a home should be as effortless as booking a ride.

Our mission is to enable anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai http://Base360.ai, our proprietary technology platform, we are building the operating system for modern renting—automating operations, connecting fragmented systems, and creating seamless experiences for guests, landlords, and operators across the world.

We're looking for a Full-Stack Engineering Lead to help scale both our technology and our engineering culture.

This is a hands-on leadership role. You'll spend the majority of your time building products, solving technical challenges, and architecting systems while also helping guide engineering standards, mentoring team members, and shaping the future of the platform.

If you're excited about ownership, rapid execution, AI, automation, and building products that have real-world impact, we'd love to meet you.



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD

As a Full-Stack Engineering Lead, you'll lead the development of Base360.ai http://Base360.ai, the technology platform powering every aspect of The Flex.

You'll work across product, engineering, AI, and operations to create scalable systems that automate processes, improve decision-making, and accelerate company growth.

You'll be responsible not only for what gets built, but how it's built.



YOUR MISSION


LEAD PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT

Design, build, and launch high-impact products that improve guest experience, operational efficiency, and business performance.


ARCHITECT SCALABLE SYSTEMS

Make key technical decisions that ensure the platform remains scalable, reliable, and maintainable as the company grows internationally.


DRIVE ENGINEERING EXCELLENCE

Establish engineering best practices, code quality standards, development workflows, and technical documentation.


MENTOR AND SUPPORT ENGINEERS

Provide technical guidance, conduct code reviews, and help create a high-performance engineering culture focused on continuous improvement.


BUILD AUTOMATION AT SCALE

Develop systems that eliminate manual work and allow operations to scale efficiently across multiple markets.


INTEGRATE CRITICAL PLATFORMS

Build and maintain integrations with platforms including Airbnb, Hostaway, Stripe, Twilio, Google, OpenAI, and other strategic partners.


LEVERAGE AI

Implement AI-powered workflows, tools, and agents that improve productivity and decision-making across the business.


COLLABORATE ACROSS TEAMS

Work closely with product, operations, revenue, and leadership teams to translate business challenges into scalable technical solutions.



TECH STACK

Our current stack includes:

 - Python

 - FastAPI

 - React

 - TypeScript

 - Supabase

 - PostgreSQL

 - AWS

 - OpenAI APIs

 - Stripe

 - Twilio

 - Docker

 - GitHub Actions

You don't need experience with every technology listed, but you should be comfortable learning quickly and leading technical decisions.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR


MUST HAVE

 - Strong full-stack software engineering experience

 - Experience designing and scaling production systems

 - Strong understanding of APIs, databases, cloud infrastructure, and system architecture

 - Experience leading technical projects from concept to deployment

 - Excellent problem-solving and communication skills

 - Ability to balance speed with engineering quality

 - Strong ownership mentality and bias toward execution


BONUS POINTS

 - Experience leading engineers or technical teams

 - Startup or scale-up experience

 - Experience with AI products or LLM integrations

 - Experience with SaaS, marketplace, travel, or PropTech businesses

 - Experience with FastAPI, React, AWS, or Supabase
   


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Within your first year:

 - Core systems become more scalable, reliable, and automated

 - Engineering velocity increases significantly

 - Technical debt is reduced without slowing innovation

 - AI-powered workflows are deployed across the business

source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
At The Flex, we believe renting a home should feel as effortless as booking a ride.

Our mission is ambitious: enable anyone to live anywhere, anytime, without friction.

Powered by Base360.ai http://Base360.ai, our proprietary automation platform, we are building the operating system for modern renting—connecting property data, orchestrating operations, automating workflows, and enabling seamless stays across continents.

We're looking for a highly ambitious engineer who wants to build systems that create leverage at scale. This isn't a role where you'll spend months debating specifications. You'll build, ship, automate, and solve real-world problems that directly impact thousands of guests and properties.

If you're excited by APIs, automation, AI agents, cloud infrastructure, and building products from the ground up, we want to meet you.



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD

As a Founding Software Engineer, you'll help architect and scale Base360.ai http://Base360.ai—the technology platform powering every aspect of The Flex.

You'll build internal products, automation engines, AI-powered workflows, integrations, and operational systems that eliminate manual work and allow the business to scale globally.

Your work will touch everything from guest journeys and property operations to pricing intelligence and AI-driven decision-making.



YOUR MISSION



BUILD THE CORE PLATFORM

Design and develop scalable applications, services, and APIs that power bookings, pricing, payments, guest experiences, and operations.


CREATE POWERFUL AUTOMATIONS

Build event-driven workflows that automate tasks previously performed by humans.

Leverage LLMs, AI agents, and machine intelligence to streamline operations, improve decision-making, and enhance customer experiences.

SOLVE COMPLEX OPERATIONAL PROBLEMS

MOVE FAST

Own projects end-to-end—from idea to deployment—and continuously improve the systems you build.



TECH STACK

 - Supabase

 - PostgreSQL

 - AWS

 - Serverless Architecture

 - OpenAI APIs

 - Twilio

 - Stripe

 - Docker

 - GitHub Actions
   


YOU MIGHT BE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE

 - Strong experience building production-grade software systems

 - Strong understanding of APIs, distributed systems, and cloud architecture

 - Experience designing scalable backend systems

 - Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 - Strong problem-solving ability and product mindset

 - Curiosity about AI, automation, and operational efficiency

 - A bias toward action and shipping
   

Bonus points for experience with:

 - Property technology (PropTech)

 - Marketplace businesses

 - AI agents and workflow automation

 - Event-driven architectures

 - Supabase

WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Within your first 12 months:

 - Core operational processes are automated through systems you've built

 - Manual work across the business is significantly reduced

 - New integrations are deployed and maintained reliably

 - AI-powered workflows become part of everyday operations

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketer
source_jobs.description:
Our vision

Every B2C brand in the world is drowning in scattered tools, missed messages, and manual work. We're building the one system that runs it all — every conversation, every channel, every lead, powered by AI. Base360 is on a mission to become the operating system that B2C brands everywhere run their business on. We're early, we're moving fast, and we're looking for people who want to help build something huge from the ground up.

About the role

We're looking for Growth Marketers to help Base360 reach the B2C brands who need us — and turn attention into signups, leads, and customers. We're channel-agnostic about how you do it: you might go deep and own a single channel, or stay broad and run across several. Paid ads, SEO, outbound, content, lifecycle, funnels — wherever your instincts pull you, we want people who can find what works and make it grow.

This is a hands-on, entrepreneurial role. You won't be one cog in a giant machine — you'll be trusted to experiment, learn fast, and build the growth engine as you go.

What you'll do

 - Own a growth channel end to end — or run across several — setting the strategy, running the campaigns, and answering for the results.

 - Generate leads and drive signups — build and run the motions that fill the pipeline, from paid and SEO to outbound and referral.

 - Run experiments fast — test hooks, audiences, funnels, and offers; kill what doesn't work and scale what does.

 - Use AI everywhere it gives you an edge — for research, copy, targeting, automation, and speed.

 - Build funnels and landing pages that convert, and obsess over the numbers behind every step.

 - Work closely with the founder on positioning, messaging, and where to point the growth firepower next.

 - Track everything — you live in the data and can tell a clear story about what's working and why.

Who you are

 - You're a fast learner above all — you may specialise in one growth channel or be a generalist across many, but either way you pick up new skills quickly and love figuring things out.

 - You're hungry to get great at growth — you don't need to be an expert yet, but you're determined to become one of the best.

 - You're AI-savvy and use modern tools to work faster and smarter than a traditional marketer.

 - You're scrappy and self-directed — you take a goal and figure out the how, without waiting to be told.

 - You're analytical — comfortable with data, attribution, and turning insight into action.

 - Bonus: any hands-on experience with paid, SEO, outbound, content, lifecycle, or marketing to B2C brands and startups.

Why Join Base360.ai http://Base360.ai?

 - Be part of an innovative and fast-growing company building the AI operating system for B2C brands.

 - Opportunity to build a team and establish a long-term presence in one of Europe's most vibrant cities.

 - Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

 - A chance to grow professionally in a hands-on, entrepreneurial role.

You should NOT apply if:

 - You are looking for a corporate 9 to 5 job.

 - You are political and enjoy gossiping and talking about people behind their backs.

 - You are looking for a stable and slow dead-end job.

 - You do not aim to be one of the best in the world at what you do.



#LI-Remote

notes: Highly technical roles, rapid hiring pace, and ambitious mission suggest a startup with strong engineering focus.
